mapper.sql: id, product_code, product_name, sku, purchase_quantity, unit, tax_included_price, purchase_date, inbound_date, inbound_quantity, inbound_remark, outbound_date, czech_warehouse_qty, uk_warehouse_qty, us_warehouse_qty, de_warehouse_qty, fba_de_qty, fba_uk_qty, fba_us_qty, fba_fr_qty, remaining_stock, remark, customs_unit, declaration_elements, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM customs_inventory_list
AND ( sku LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY id
SELECT FROM customs_inventory_list WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM customs_inventory_list WHERE id IN #{id} ORDER BY id

SELECT MIN(id) AS id, product_code, product_name, sku, customs_unit AS unit, NULL AS purchase_quantity, NULL AS tax_included_price, NULL AS purchase_date, NULL AS inbound_date, NULL AS inbound_quantity, NULL AS inbound_remark, NULL AS outbound_date, NULL AS czech_warehouse_qty, NULL AS uk_warehouse_qty, NULL AS us_warehouse_qty, NULL AS de_warehouse_qty, NULL AS fba_de_qty, NULL AS fba_uk_qty, NULL AS fba_us_qty, NULL AS fba_fr_qty, NULL AS remaining_stock, NULL AS remark, customs_unit AS customs_unit, NULL AS declaration_elements, NULL AS created_at, NULL AS updated_at FROM customs_inventory_list
AND (product_code IS NOT NULL AND product_code != '' OR product_name IS NOT NULL AND product_name != '' OR sku IS NOT NULL AND sku != '' OR customs_unit IS NOT NULL AND customs_unit != '')
AND product_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productCode}, '%')
AND product_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{productName}, '%')
AND sku LIKE CONCAT('%', #{sku}, '%')
AND customs_unit LIKE CONCAT('%', #{unit}, '%')
GROUP BY product_code, product_name, sku, customs_unit ORDER BY CASE WHEN #{sku} IS NOT NULL AND #{sku} != '' AND sku = #{sku} THEN 0 WHEN #{productCode} IS NOT NULL AND #{productCode} != '' AND product_code = #{productCode} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, product_code, sku LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO customs_inventory_list (product_code, product_name, sku, purchase_quantity, unit, tax_included_price, purchase_date, inbound_date, inbound_quantity, inbound_remark, outbound_date, czech_warehouse_qty, uk_warehouse_qty, us_warehouse_qty, de_warehouse_qty, fba_de_qty, fba_uk_qty, fba_us_qty, fba_fr_qty, remaining_stock, remark, customs_unit, declaration_elements) VALUES (#{productCode}, #{productName}, #{sku}, #{purchaseQuantity}, #{unit}, #{taxIncludedPrice}, #{purchaseDate}, #{inboundDate}, #{inboundQuantity}, #{inboundRemark}, #{outboundDate}, #{czechWarehouseQty}, #{ukWarehouseQty}, #{usWarehouseQty}, #{deWarehouseQty}, #{fbaDeQty}, #{fbaUkQty}, #{fbaUsQty}, #{fbaFrQty}, #{remainingStock}, #{remark}, #{customsUnit}, #{declarationElements})
mapper.update: UPDATE customs_inventory_list SET product_code = #{productCode}, product_name = #{productName}, sku = #{sku}, purchase_quantity = #{purchaseQuantity}, unit = #{unit}, tax_included_price = #{taxIncludedPrice}, purchase_date = #{purchaseDate}, inbound_date = #{inboundDate}, inbound_quantity = #{inboundQuantity}, inbound_remark = #{inboundRemark}, outbound_date = #{outboundDate}, czech_warehouse_qty = #{czechWarehouseQty}, uk_warehouse_qty = #{ukWarehouseQty}, us_warehouse_qty = #{usWarehouseQty}, de_warehouse_qty = #{deWarehouseQty}, fba_de_qty = #{fbaDeQty}, fba_uk_qty = #{fbaUkQty}, fba_us_qty = #{fbaUsQty}, fba_fr_qty = #{fbaFrQty}, remaining_stock = #{remainingStock}, remark = #{remark}, customs_unit = #{customsUnit}, declaration_elements = #{declarationElements} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO customs_inventory_list (product_code, product_name, sku, purchase_quantity, unit, tax_included_price, purchase_date, inbound_date, inbound_quantity, inbound_remark, outbound_date, czech_warehouse_qty, uk_warehouse_qty, us_warehouse_qty, de_warehouse_qty, fba_de_qty, fba_uk_qty, fba_us_qty, fba_fr_qty, remaining_stock, remark, customs_unit, declaration_elements) VALUES
(#{item.productCode}, #{item.productName}, #{item.sku}, #{item.purchaseQuantity}, #{item.unit}, #{item.taxIncludedPrice}, #{item.purchaseDate}, #{item.inboundDate}, #{item.inboundQuantity}, #{item.inboundRemark}, #{item.outboundDate}, #{item.czechWarehouseQty}, #{item.ukWarehouseQty}, #{item.usWarehouseQty}, #{item.deWarehouseQty}, #{item.fbaDeQty}, #{item.fbaUkQty}, #{item.fbaUsQty}, #{item.fbaFrQty}, #{item.remainingStock}, #{item.remark}, #{item.customsUnit}, #{item.declarationElements})
mapper.update: UPDATE customs_inventory_list SET declaration_elements = #{item.declarationElements}, product_name = #{item.productName}, customs_unit = #{item.customsUnit}, tax_included_price = #{item.taxIncludedPrice}, product_code = #{item.sourceLocation}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE sku = #{item.sku} AND IFNULL(product_code, '') = IFNULL(#{item.sourceLocation}, '')
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO customs_inventory_list (sku, product_code, product_name, declaration_elements, customs_unit, tax_included_price) VALUES
(#{item.sku}, #{item.sourceLocation}, #{item.productName}, #{item.declarationElements}, #{item.customsUnit}, #{item.taxIncludedPrice})
mapper.select:
SELECT sku, product_code AS sourceLocation FROM customs_inventory_list WHERE
sku = #{k.sku} OR sku LIKE CONCAT('%', #{k.sku})
